title: Claude Fable 5 (TESTED): UHM... It's actually not worth it..
summary: AICodeKing tests Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 models, examining their coding performance, safety mechanisms, and real-world usefulness. The reviewer finds Fable 5 performs well on benchmarks but questions whether it justifies adoption over existing models like Opus or GPT-5.5 due to cost and limited practical improvements.
